name: RBL Bank ShopRite Credit Card
exclusions: grocery accelerated rewards follow RBL merchant-category rules
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of Rs 1,50,000 in the previous year
additionalBenefits: 20 reward points for every Rs 100 spent on grocery
1 reward point for every Rs 100 on other eligible spends
Monthly movie discount benefit on BookMyShow
Fuel surcharge waiver on eligible spends

salaried: Eligibility is subject to RBL Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to RBL Bank approval criteria
